howItWorks.intro: This crypto liquidation price calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

faq.question: What is liquidation in crypto?
faq.answer: Liquidation occurs when your leveraged position loses enough value that your margin can no longer sustain it. The exchange automatically closes your position, and you lose your entire margin deposit.

faq.question: How much leverage is safe?
faq.answer: Most professional traders use 2-5x leverage. Anything above 10x is extremely risky — a 10% move against you at 10x leverage wipes out your entire margin.
